book.of.workflow 0.1.3.4
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Book of Workflow

Source: R/book.of.workflow.R
book.of.workflow.Rd

book.of.workflow facilitates repetitive, ad hoc tasks commonly encountered during data processing and workflow management.

The following functional chapters are covered in book.of.workflow:

Chapter 1 - Environment Integrity

FunctionSynopsis
%-=%Removes named objects from an environment target.
%+=%Assigns/adds named objects into an environment target.
%must.have%Validates required objects and enforces presence checks.
check.envChecks environment state and object availability.
check_env_argValidates environment argument inputs for workflow helpers.

Chapter 2 - Environment Processing

FunctionSynopsis
copy.objCopies selected objects between environments.
copy_objAlias for copy.obj.
load.unloadedLoads objects that are currently not present in memory.
load_unloadedAlias for load.unloaded.
refer.toCreates or updates object references for reuse.
refer_toAlias for refer.to.
save.objSaves selected objects to disk.
save_imageSaves the working image/environment state.

Chapter 3 - Workflow Management

FunctionSynopsis
check_actionValidates and normalizes action declarations in workflows.
is_studio_audienceDetects whether the session target is an RStudio audience.
make.snippetCreates reusable snippet definitions.
make_snippetAlias for make.snippet.
read.snippetReads saved snippet content for reuse.
read_snippetAlias for read.snippet.
snippets_tocProduces a table of contents for available snippets.

Installation

Use remotes::install_github("delriaan/book.of.workflow", subdir = "pkg") to install the latest version from GitHub.

Contents

Developed by Chionesu George.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
